column553:
In the historic Andersonville neighborhood, this brick condo building-turned-boutique hotel is in the historic Andersonville neighborhood, 1 mile from Lake Michigan's shore and 0.6 miles from an El train station (it's a 22-minute ride to The Loop in Downtown).
 The modern 1-, 2- and 3-bedroom suites feature granite kitchens, private balconies or patios with gas grills, and washer/dryers. Each unit is equipped with such high-tech amenities as flat-screen TVs and free WiFi. Some have gas fireplaces and soaking tubs. Penthouse suites have a private rooftop deck with skyline views.
 Guests get use of a business center and fitness room.

column19: Understated rooms in a casual motel featuring an outdoor pool & complimentary Wi-Fi.
column173:
This unassuming budget motel is a 6-minute walk from San Buenaventura State Beach and 2 miles from the Ventura Theatre.
 Simply furnished rooms come with complimentary Wi-Fi, as well as flat-screen TVs and desks. Some rooms add dining tables, minifridges and sitting areas.
 Morning coffee is provided at no additional cost. There's also an outdoor pool and coin-operated laundry facilities. Pets are welcome. Parking is available.

column19: Roadside budget property offering modern rooms & an outdoor pool, plus free morning coffee.
column173:
This unpretentious budget lodging is next to Interstate 84, 15 miles east of Portland and a mile from the Columbia Gorge Outlets Mall.
 The colorful, modern rooms include flat-screen TVs with expanded cable channels, plus wood floors, granite countertops and WiFi (fee). Minifridges are available for an extra charge. Kids 17 and under stay free with an adult family member.
 Free morning coffee and parking are offered, as well as a seasonal outdoor pool and a coin laundry.
